hooks.command: npm run lint && npm run format:check
hooks.statusMessage: Running lint and format check before push...

hooks.command: output=$(npm run test 2>&1); code=$?; if [ $code -ne 0 ]; then echo "$output" | tail -30 | jq -Rs '{"decision":"block","reason":("Unit tests are failing — fix them before finishing:\n" + .)}'; fi; exit $code
